title: Short, specific finding title
type: IDOR | BOLA | XSS | SQLi | SSRF | BrokenAuth | OpenRedirect | InfoLeak | ...
description: What the vulnerability is and where it occurs.
impact: What an attacker gains (e.g. read another user's data).
steps_to_reproduce: 1. Authenticate as Account A and capture GET /v1/.../?global_user_id=<A>.
2. Replay the request with Account B's session, keeping A's id.
3. Observe A's data returned to B.
request:
GET /v1/super-app/pillars/?global_user_id=<A>&pillar=digikala HTTP/1.1
Host: api.digikala.com
Cookie: <B's session>
evidence: Why this response proves cross-account access.
remediation: Enforce object-level authorization: verify the requested id belongs to the authenticated user.
